name: Joe
css: .joe-wrap { width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0f2027, #203a43, #2c5364); } .joe-text { font-family: 'Arial Black', sans-serif; font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 9vw, 4.5rem); font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: #00e5ff; text-shadow: 0 0 8px #00e5ff, 0 0 24px #00b8d4, 0 0 50px #006064; animation: joe-flicker 3s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes joe-flicker { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; text-shadow: 0 0 8px #00e5ff, 0 0 24px #00b8d4, 0 0 50px #006064; } 45% { opacity: 0.85; text-shadow: 0 0 4px #00e5ff, 0 0 12px #00b8d4; } 50% { opacity: 1; text-shadow: 0 0 16px #00e5ff, 0 0 40px #00b8d4, 0 0 80px #006064; } }
